top_topics_and_questions: String Stream based medium level
Graph Based hard level
Partition rectangles to equal area
Necessary conditions for deadlock, mutexes and semaphores
Horizontal vs vertical scaling, runtime/compile time polymorphism
Longest palindrome from concatenating prefix and suffix
Trapping rainwater variation
Adobe.other_relevant_information: Only approach and pseudocode were expected in the interview rounds.

rounds.details: 3 Questions: 1 MCQ based on Computer Fundamentals, 2 coding questions (String Stream medium, Graph hard).
Introduction, project discussion (JS/React), 1 DSA question (partition non-overlapping rectangles), core CS subjects (DBMS, OS, OOPs).
CS courses studied, in-depth DBMS, OS, OOPS with follow-ups, 2 DSA questions (longest palindrome prefix/suffix, trapping rainwater variation).

top_topics_and_questions: Maximum consecutive ones after flipping k 0's
Length of the longest substring with unique characters
Dungeon Game (Leetcode)
C++ code demonstrating operator overloading
Expedia.other_relevant_information: Cappfinity round involves a general 75 mins long case based question focusing on basic 5 principles of Expedia.

rounds.details: 75 mins long case-based question.
2 coding questions (Array medium, String medium).
Introduction, major projects, 2 DSA questions (sliding window, longest substring), behavioral questions (handling negative feedback).
Deep learning project discussion, 1 DSA question (Dungeon Game), 1 OOP question (C++ operator overloading).

top_topics_and_questions: Find the k most frequent strings
Dungeon Game
Operator overloading to change cout<< output
Sprinklr.other_relevant_information: Multiple approaches were asked and complete code was expected in C++.

rounds.details: 3 coding questions (Array medium, Graph hard, DP medium).
DSA question (k most frequent strings), generic project questions.
Introduction, deep learning project, DSA problem (Dungeon Game), C++ operator overloading.
HR Round.

top_topics_and_questions: Guesstimate for new airline starting flights to make profit
Basic SQL questions involving writing queries and joins
